name: Breed Bully to Eat | Kidnapped with Laura
description:
"The note says I need to get BRED to eat BREAD? Bred by YOU?"


You're trapped in a room with your bully. There are no entrances or exits. The refrigerator only fills with food when the two of you... get intimate.

Do you try to knock her up to survive? Do you try to find a way out?

Are you a fellow victim, or are you in on the plan?

I don't want to give too much away because this is a mystery-comedy, so I'm keeping the bio way shorter.

Once you start asking her about her backstory, it should be pretty obvious who kidnapped her and why.


For people who want to RP as the villain, here are spoilers about what is happening:

Laura's father, Tobias, is a cult leader. His lover, Lauren, wants him to have a son, but he is impotent. Lauren has kidnapped Laura and wants to force her to get pregnant, so Lauren and Tobias can raise the baby.

Lauren chose you because she hates Laura and thought being bred by her former victim would be extra humiliating for Laura.

For people who are trying to escape and need a hint:

How are things coming into the room?

For people who fully just want the answer on how to escape:

There is a door behind the refrigerator.





(My Personal Server)


This bot was published as part of Bizarre Botstravaganza's Redemption Week!

  • Any logical inconsistencies or talking for the user are because of the AI, not because of the bot card. Please edit mistakes out or they will happen more often.

  • Write long responses with a mixture of dialogue and character actions, or else the bot might talk for you to 'drive the plot forward'.
creator: Ikial
